Elsholtzia ciliata, commonly known as Elsanta, is an herbaceous perennial plant native to Asia, known for its fragrant leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Elsholtzia ciliata include its potential to reduce stress, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure, thanks to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Elsholtzia ciliata is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in traditional Asian medicine to promote overall well-being.
